attempts.last_message_excerpt:
Implemented real local branch/checkout navigation in the owned surface. `checkout` now switches `HEAD` to either a branch ref or a detached commit, updates the working tree from the target commit, refuses dirty tracked changes or untracked overwrite cases, and keeps nested tracked paths and index clearing consistent. I also aligned the command help/output so `checkout` reports branch switches vs detached HEAD, while `restore` remains a non-HEAD-moving tree restore.

Key changes are in [reposi...

Implemented real local merge/rebase execution on top of the existing commit graph.

`merge` now accepts a revision, computes merge bases, fast-forwards when possible, writes real merge commits for clean non-fast-forward cases, and persists merge state with deterministic conflict markers when a three-way file merge cannot resolve cleanly. That logic lives in [src/lit/merge_ops.py](/C:/Users/alber/OneDrive/문서/GitHub/codex_auto/None/projects/c-users-alber-onedrive-github-lit-main-54cb49de20/.par...
